summary: Production testing of GIG ZipFinder COMPLETE. Major issues from iteration_3 are RESOLVED. Backend API on Railway is now working correctly (returning JSON, not HTML). Stripe checkout with LIVE keys is functional. 14/15 backend tests passed. Frontend loads with HTTPS on www.gigzipfinder.com.

critical.issue: AI ZIP code search fails with 500 error: 'name LlmChat is not defined'. The LlmChat and UserMessage classes are used but never imported from the Emergent SDK.

minor.issue: Console shows 404 for /api/apk/apk-info - correct endpoint may be different naming

action_items: CRITICAL: Add missing imports to server.py for AI search: 'from emergent import LlmChat, UserMessage' or use litellm directly as fallback
Consider implementing fallback mechanism if LlmChat is not available
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses LlmChat class at lines 997, 1075, 2174 but never imports it - production bug
AI search endpoint currently broken - users cannot get AI-suggested ZIP codes
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production environment is WORKING now. Previous iteration_3 issues with API returning HTML and expired Stripe keys are RESOLVED. Only remaining issue is AI search (/api/search-zip-codes/{app_name}) failing due to missing LlmChat import. All other functionality works: Stripe checkout, PDF downloads, terms, ZIP codes retrieval, APK download.

production_domain_https.details: www.gigzipfinder.com loads with HTTPS, valid SSL certificate

backend_api_routing.details: gigzipfinder-production.up.railway.app/api/* returns JSON responses correctly (FIXED from iteration_3)

stripe_checkout.details: LIVE Stripe keys working, checkout session created successfully, redirects to checkout.stripe.com

ai_zip_search.details: Returns 500 error: 'name LlmChat is not defined'. Missing import statement in server.py

pdf_downloads.details: All 8 PDF guides downloadable (Instacart/DoorDash/Spark/GoogleVoice x EN/ES)

language_switching.details: Language dropdown shows English, Spanish, Portuguese options

mobile_responsive.details: Mobile viewport shows hamburger menu, properly stacked layout, buttons accessible

backend_test_results.failure_details: test_ai_search_instacart - Expected failure due to LlmChat not imported

production_fixes_verified.stripe_keys: FIXED - LIVE keys now working (updated from expired keys)
production_fixes_verified.api_routing: FIXED - All /api/* endpoints return JSON, not HTML
production_fixes_verified.backend_connectivity: FIXED - Frontend can reach backend via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL

rca_of_the_issue: AI ZIP search fails because LlmChat class from Emergent SDK is used at server.py lines 997, 1075, 2174 but never imported. The code references 'chat = LlmChat(...)' and 'UserMessage(text=...)' but these classes are not defined or imported. Solution: Add 'from emergent import LlmChat, UserMessage' at top of server.py or refactor to use litellm directly.
